source_jobs.title: Business Development Representative
source_jobs.description:
Business Development Representative



Location:
USA (100% Remote)
Canada (100% Remote)

 

Procurify is the AI-enhanced procurement and AP automation platform for the mid-market. We make it easy for organizations to take control of spend and save money. We’re looking for a talented and team-driven Business Development Representative to join us on our journey.

 

ABOUT THE ROLE

 

As a Business Development Representative, you will be responsible for all top of funnel activities that create qualified opportunities for our sales team. You will work across a variety of lead types, including warm inbound prospects and cold outbound outreach. This is a high-impact role where you’ll join a team of high performers dedicated to building relationships, achieving quotas, and delivering exceptional results.

 


WHAT YOU’LL BE WORKING ON:

 - Conduct market research to identify potential target customers, industries, and market trends.

 - Contact potential clients through cold-calling and cold-emailing to establish rapport and arrange meetings.

 - Qualify leads by understanding their needs, pain points, and fit for our solutions.

 - Engage in networking, face-to-face meetings, and other activities to generate and close leads.

 - Conduct initial discovery calls to educate prospects about our offerings.

 - Stay up-to-date on trends and news from the industry, competitors, and target market.

 - Collaborate with the sales team to develop and execute strategies to meet revenue targets.

 - Build and nurture relationships with prospects, guiding them through the sales funnel.

 - Maintain accurate and up-to-date records of prospect interactions and sales activities in the CRM system.

 

Tech Stack:

 - Salesforce

 - Nooks

 - Zoominfo

 - Gong/ Gong Engage

 - LinkedIn Sales Navigator
   




WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

 - At least 1 year of any sales or quota-carrying experience.

 - Competitive and refuses to lose.

 - Takes ownership of success and embraces the grind to complete tasks.

 - Highly driven and goal-oriented, willing to work as hard as necessary to achieve success.

 - Committed to continuous learning and self-improvement.

 - Has strong communication, negotiation, and persuasion skills.

 - Self-motivated with a target-driven mindset.

 - Thrives in a fast-paced environment and works well both independently and as part of a team.

 - Technically inclined and eager to learn new tools or software.

 - For customer-facing roles, maintains an up-to-date LinkedIn profile and ensures it is refreshed upon joining, to reflect their role at Procurify and help maintain a consistent, professional presence across our GTM team.

KPI’s:

Core Areas of Focus beyond quota achievement:

 - Conversion ratios

 - Speed to lead

 - Dial volume

 - Forecast Accuracy






WHY PROCURIFY?

 

We’re committed to helping mission-driven organizations spend smarter

Procurify is a remote-first company with a big heart and a strong ambition to modernize the way organizations manage business spend. We’re looking for talented and team-driven individuals to join us on our journey to build a place where the best people want to work – a place where every team member is empowered to apply their best thinking, push boundaries thoughtfully, and drive high performance together.

 

You’re empowered to do your best work

We’ve created an environment where personal and professional growth is a real priority. Some of the great perks we offer include:

 - Flexible working: We’re a remote-first organization with flexible working hours. Work anywhere from within Canada or the U.S.!

 - Responsible time off: We trust our team to take the time they need to rest and recharge while staying accountable to their commitments.

 - Extended health benefits: We prioritize our team’s health and well-being. We offer a competitive health, vision, and dental package along with an Employee Assistance Program (EAP), and a health and wellness spending account.

 - Community initi

source_jobs.title: Engineering Manager, AI Engineering
source_jobs.description:
ENGINEERING MANAGER -AI



About Us



Procurify is the Intelligent Spend Management company. We're on a mission to give all organizations unprecedented visibility and control over their business spend. Our industry-leading platform unifies data across procurement, AP, and expenses, helping finance and operations teams capture, analyze, and optimize every dollar of spend.

We're a remote-first company backed by leading investors, helping mid-market organizations modernize how they manage spend.




THE OPPORTUNITY



We're hiring an Engineering Manager, AI Engineering to lead our AI Engineering team. This team is responsible for building and operating the intelligence layer that powers Procurify's platform, leveraging Generative AI, Machine Learning, LLMs, and agentic systems to help customers automate workflows, uncover insights, and make more effective spending decisions.

This is a player-coach leadership role. You'll lead a team of AI Engineers while remaining deeply involved in technical strategy, architecture, prototyping, and critical implementation decisions. You'll balance people leadership with hands-on technical contribution, helping shape both our AI platform and the next generation of AI-powered customer experiences.

You'll work closely with Product, Design, Platform Engineering, Security, and Engineering leadership to define and execute Procurify's AI strategy while building a highly engaged, high-performing team. You value accountability, technical excellence, and know how to balance long-term vision with pragmatic execution.




WHAT YOU'LL DO




LEAD & MENTOR

 - Manage a team of AI Engineers, providing coaching for technical excellence, fostering individual career growth, and nurturing a high-performance culture built on trust, ownership, experimentation, and collaboration.


LEAD THROUGH TECHNICAL CONTRIBUTION

 - Serve as a player-coach by actively participating in architecture reviews, technical design, prototyping, proof-of-concepts, and critical implementation efforts. Maintain technical credibility through active engagement with the team's work and technical direction.


DRIVE AI PRODUCT DELIVERY

 - Lead your team to consistently deliver high-impact AI-powered products and platform capabilities. You'll define success metrics, track progress transparently, and proactively communicate with stakeholders to ensure alignment and business impact.


SHAPE AI ARCHITECTURE & TECHNICAL VISION

 - Lead the technical strategy for AI Engineering by partnering with key stakeholders across Product, Platform, and Security to align our technical investments with business goals. By building foundational platforms rather, you will define the architectural standards and guardrails that empower our team to innovate at speed and scale agentic workflows, RAG systems, and LLM-powered features. Your focus includes:
   
   - LLM-powered applications
   
   - Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems
   
   - Agentic workflows and orchestration
   
   - Prompt and context engineering frameworks
   
   - AI evaluation systems
   
   - AI observability and monitoring
   
   - Responsible AI and governance practices


BUILD PRODUCTION-GRADE AI SYSTEMS

 - Guide the design, development, deployment, and operation of AI services and infrastructure, including:

 - LLM and model integrations

 - Knowledge retrieval systems

 - AI orchestration platforms

 - Agent frameworks

 - Evaluation and testing frameworks

 - AI monitoring and feedback loops


BALANCE INNOVATION & EXECUTION

 - Think strategically to balance experimentation, technical debt reduction, platform investments, and product delivery. Help the organization move quickly while maintaining engineering quality and operational excellence.


GROW OUR ENGINEERING CULTURE

 - Work with Engineering leadership to evolve Procurify's engineering culture, championing technical excellence, responsible innovation, continuous learning, and disciplined execution.


COLLABORATE BROADL

source_jobs.title: Product Strategy & Operations Lead
source_jobs.description:
Product Strategy & Operations Lead




ABOUT US



Procurify is the Intelligent Spend Management company. We’re on a mission to give all organizations unprecedented visibility and control over their business spend. Our industry-leading platform unifies data across procurement, AP, and expenses, helping finance and operations teams capture, analyze, and optimize every dollar of spend. We’re a remote-first company backed by leading investors, helping mid-market organizations modernize how they manage spend.




THE OPPORTUNITY



We’re looking for a Product Strategy & Operations Lead to partner with our CPTO and Product & Engineering leadership team to drive alignment, focus, and execution across the R&D organization.



This is a strategic and operational leadership role - part architect of how we plan and execute, part operator ensuring that our most important initiatives translate from vision to impact. You’ll help the CPTO and leadership team connect strategy to execution, strengthen cross-functional coordination, and scale how the organization runs.



If you’re a structured thinker with experience in strategy consulting, business operations, or technical program leadership, this role gives you the opportunity to influence the trajectory of a growing fintech SaaS company and shape the operating rhythm of its product and engineering engine.




WHAT YOU’LL DO



Strategic Planning & Alignment

 - Partner with the CPTO and Product & Engineering leadership to drive quarterly strategic planning.

 - Translate business priorities into clear, actionable initiatives with defined outcomes, owners, and success metrics.

 - Ensure alignment between product strategy, roadmap investments, and company strategy.

 - Support board and executive presentations through crisp storytelling and progress summaries.

 - Act as a trusted advisor to the CPTO, representing them in select meetings, following up on strategic actions, and helping scale their impact across the organization.



Execution & Operating Cadence

 - Own the operational rhythm of the R&D organization - planning cycles, leadership reviews, KPIs, retrospectives, and communication cadences.

 - Establish and continuously improve frameworks for execution excellence, including dependency management, prioritization, and risk visibility.

 - Drive accountability and transparency across initiatives through consistent tracking, reporting, and follow-through.



Cross-Functional Coordination

 - Act as a bridge between R&D and GTM teams to ensure initiatives move cohesively from concept to customer value.

 - Coordinate strategic initiatives spanning multiple domains (e.g., AI, data platform, developer velocity, product quality).

 - Partner with Product Marketing, Customer Success, and Sales leadership to ensure effective go-to-market readiness for major launches.



Continuous Improvement

 - Identify and lead process improvement opportunities to make the organization more focused, efficient, and data-driven.

 - Create and maintain systems and artifacts that enhance decision-making (roadmaps, initiative trackers, KPI dashboards).

 - Champion a culture of clarity, accountability, and velocity across R&D.




LEAD WITH CARES:

 - Commitment: Demonstrates accountability and follow-through, delivering reliably and owning outcomes in a way that others can depend on.

 - Ambition: Takes initiative with curiosity and a growth mindset, pursuing bold ideas that elevate impact and performance.

 - Resilience: Shows adaptability, composure, and perseverance through challenges, staying focused and effective in a fast-changing environment.

 - Excellence: Brings rigor, collaboration, and a strong quality focus to deliver high-performing solutions and raise the bar for outcomes.

 - Simplicity: Applies focus, clarity, and streamlining to cut through complexity and enable efficient, impactful execution.




WHAT YOU BRING:



Required

 - 5–10 years of experience in strategy consulting, technical

source_jobs.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
source_jobs.description:
SENIOR FULL STACK SOFTWARE ENGINEER




ABOUT US



Procurify is looking for a motivated, collaborative, and creative person who is passionate about technology.



Procurify is the AI-enhanced procurement and AP automation platform for mid-market organizations. We make it easy for organizations to take control of spend and save money.



We're looking for a pragmatic and thoughtful engineering leader to help scale our platform, development practices, and team.




ABOUT THE ROLE

You’re a person with a knack for solving some of the most pressing technology challenges in SaaS application development while levelling up the team of engineers around you, and you’re eager to help our customers achieve the best version of themselves.



Everyone at Procurify is a team player. A big part of this role involves a desire for personal growth, and a customer-centric mindset. We’re seeking entrepreneurial people who are willing to challenge the status quo and contribute to larger strategic objectives.




WHAT YOU’LL BE WORKING ON:



 - Build & Ship End-to-End Features: Design, develop, and maintain full stack features—from RESTful APIs and backend services to responsive, user-friendly frontend components—using Python/Django and TypeScript/React.

 - Develop Scalable Backend Services: Build and evolve backend systems that handle business logic, data storage, and integrations, ensuring performance, reliability, and scalability.

 - Create High-Quality Frontend Experiences: Implement reusable, accessible, and performant UI components in React. Collaborate with product and design to deliver intuitive user experiences.

 - Design & Optimize Database Schemas: Contribute to the design of our database models and write efficient, secure queries. You will work to ensure the performance and integrity of our data layer.

 - Champion Code Quality: Ensure you and other team members are contributing clean, efficient, testable, and reusable code that is easy to maintain and extend and aligns with our technical strategy and coding standards.

 - Strengthen System Architecture: Provide leadership in the technical output of your team and ensure technical designs follow appropriate design patterns, are architecturally sound, and adhere to secure coding practices.

 - Ensure System Reliability: Enable the observability and monitoring of relevant system behavior in the areas of the application owned by your team and use the data collected to propose improvements to application performance and stability.

 - Our Tech Stack:
   
   - Application: Python/Django, Typescript/React
   
   - Cloud: AWS
   
   - Infrastructure & Containers: AWS, Kubernetes, Terraform
   
   - Databases: MySQL
   
   - CI/CD: CircleCI




WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:



 - Full Stack Experience: 5+ years of professional experience in hands-on work across both frontend and backend systems, preferably in a SaaS environment.

 - AI & ML: Deep understanding of LLMs, prompt engineering, RAG architectures, vector databases (Databricks/pgVector), and agentic AI frameworks (LangChain, Google ADK, or similar)

 - Python Proficiency: Strong experience building and maintaining applications using Python and a major web framework (we use Django).

 - React: Experience building modern web applications with React and TypeScript, including component-based architecture and state management.

 - Agile & Collaborative: Experience working with agile practices (Scrum/Kanban) and CI/CD principles. You thrive in a team environment.

 - Empathetic & Accountable: You act with compassion, believe that your team’s success is your success, and communicate effectively with both technical and non-technical colleagues.

 - Maintains a professional and current LinkedIn profile, ensuring it is updated upon joining Procurify to reflect their new role and maintain a consistent company presence.




LEAD WITH CARES:



 - Commitment: Demonstrates accountability and follow-through, delivering reliably and owning outcomes in a

source_jobs.title: Staff Backend Engineer
source_jobs.description:
STAFF BACKEND SOFTWARE ENGINEER




ABOUT US

Procurify is the Intelligent Spend Management company. We’re on a mission to give all organizations unprecedented visibility and control over their business spend. Our industry-leading platform unifies data across procurement, AP, and expenses, helping finance and operations teams capture, analyze, and optimize every dollar of spend. We’re a remote-first company backed by leading investors, helping mid-market organizations modernize how they manage spend.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re looking for a Staff Backend Software Engineer to help define the architectural future of Procurify’s core platform. In this role, you will lead large technical projects with significant impact, working closely within our Identity, Integrations, Public API, and other cross-cutting domains within Procurify.




WHAT YOU'LL BE WORKING ON

This is a high leverage role with a clear and broad mandate. You'll partner with engineering leadership and senior ICs across engineering to shape how Procurify scales over the next several years.

 - Lead Technical Strategy & Architecture: Effectively drive architecture decisions that align with product strategy and advise Procurify's leadership team on critical technical considerations. You will collaborate with your team on technical designs to ensure they follow appropriate patterns, are architecturally sound, and improve the implementation of our backend systems.

 - Build & Ship Scalable APIs and Services: Apply your experience to design, develop, and maintain the RESTful APIs and backend services that form the foundation of our product, using Python and Django. You will work across the stack to consistently deliver software that helps Procurify set and achieve a high standard of quality, clarity, and maintainability.

 - Mentor & Elevate the Team: Teach and mentor technical leaders at Procurify. You will actively participate in code reviews and architectural discussions, delivering written and verbal technical feedback to peers to elevate the team.

 - Design & Optimize Data Systems: Contribute to the design of our database models and write efficient, secure queries, ensuring the performance and integrity of our data layer.

 - Ensure Operational Excellence: Participate in the investigation and resolution of defects and performance bottlenecks affecting the quality and stability of the monolith. You will champion code quality and contribute to a high-performance team committed to craft and operational excellence.

 - Our Tech Stack:
   
   - Application: Python/Django, Typescript/React
   
   - Cloud: AWS
   
   - Infrastructure & Containers: AWS, Kubernetes, Terraform
   
   - Databases: MySQL
   
   - CI/CD: CircleCI


LEAD WITH CARES:

 - Commitment: Demonstrates accountability and follow-through, delivering reliably and owning outcomes in a way that others can depend on.

 - Ambition: Takes initiative with curiosity and a growth mindset, pursuing bold ideas that elevate impact and performance.

 - Resilience: Shows adaptability, composure, and perseverance through challenges, staying focused and effective in a fast-changing environment.

 - Excellence: Brings rigor, collaboration, and a strong quality focus to deliver high-performing solutions and raise the bar for outcomes.

 - Simplicity: Applies focus, clarity, and streamlining to cut through complexity and enable efficient, impactful execution.


WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - Senior Engineering Experience: 10+ years of professional software engineering experience, with a focus on building reliable and scalable SaaS software solutions.

 - Python Proficiency: Strong experience building and maintaining applications using Python and a major web framework (we use Django and FastAPI).

 - AI Native Modern SaaS Experience: Experience building scalable, customer-facing SaaS products using modern technologies. You must have practical, hands-on experience accelerating development with AI tools like Claude Code, Cursor, or

source_jobs.title: Marketing Operations Manager
source_jobs.description:
Procurify is the AI-enhanced procurement and AP automation platform for the mid-market. We make it easy for organizations to take control of spending and save money. We’re looking for a talented, collaborative, and systems-minded Marketing Operations Manager to join us on our journey.




ABOUT THE ROLE



The Marketing Operations Manager is a systems-focused builder and operator dedicated to designing, maintaining, and scaling the infrastructure layer that powers Procurify’s revenue and marketing engine. Rather than just enabling the team, you will build programmatic go-to-market systems and AI-powered workflows that improve efficiency, impact, and execution across marketing.

This role focuses on ensuring that marketing infrastructure is scalable and deeply integrated, moving prospects smoothly from initial capture to closed-won. You will partner closely with Demand Generation, Content Marketing, Product Marketing, and Revenue teams to translate complex business challenges into automated technical workflows.

Reporting to the Director, Revenue Operations, you will own our marketing systems architecture, applying cutting-edge automation and agentic AI tools to scale marketing performance.




EXPERIENCE

 - 3–5 years of experience in Marketing Operations, Growth Operations, or related roles within a B2B SaaS or high-growth technology environment.

 - Marketo Expertise: Must be a Marketo Certified Expert (MCE) OR possess 3+ years of hands-on experience administering Marketo.

 - Hands-on experience building programmatic systems that support campaign execution, demand generation, and marketing performance tracking.

 - Deep experience working with modern marketing and CRM tools, specifically Salesforce CRM.

 - Advanced MarTech (Preferred):
   
   - Experience with marketing attribution tools, specifically Marketo Measure (formerly Bizible).
   
   - Experience with Account-Based Marketing (ABM) platforms such as 6sense or Demandbase is highly desirable.

 - Experience working with marketing data, reporting, campaign analysis, and web analytics platforms (e.g., Google Analytics or Amplitude).

 - Experience implementing and operating automated or AI-enabled tools within marketing workflows, with a strong instinct for identifying where manual work should become agentic.

 - A proven track record working within operational systems that are tied directly to core marketing outcomes, including lead generation, SAL creation, and pipeline acceleration.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES




SYSTEMS CREATION & CAMPAIGN OPERATIONS

 - Build programmatic, AI-orchestrated go-to-market systems and integrated workflows that fundamentally up-level our marketing infrastructure, driving exponential execution speed and impact at scale.

 - Move beyond native, out-of-the-box platform AI features by architecting bespoke AI workflows and agentic frameworks that automate complex, multi-step operational processes.

 - Maintain and scale robust campaign tracking and data infrastructure, ensuring our data architecture is optimized to power and fuel advanced AI models, automation, and analytics.

 - Partner cross-functionally to inject AI-first workflows into outbound and inbound infrastructure, continuously identifying opportunities to transition manual marketing plays into scalable, autonomous systems.
   
   


LEAD LIFECYCLE & FUNNEL ARCHITECTURE

 - Deepen ownership of the full lead-to-revenue lifecycle, designing and maintaining the systems and processes that move leads from initial capture to closed-won.

 - Optimize lead scoring, routing, and nurture programs to ensure a clean handoff between Marketing and Sales, keeping data consistent across Salesforce and Marketo.

 - Monitor funnel health and identify opportunities to leverage AI automation to improve conversion rates and lead quality across lifecycle stages.
   
   


MARKETING PERFORMANCE & PIPELINE OUTCOMES

 - Own the data architecture for marketing attribution and performance analysis across all

source_jobs.title: Senior Manager, Sales Development
source_jobs.description:
SENIOR MANAGER, SALES DEVELOPMENT



Location: Canada (Remote)



Procurify is the AI-enhanced procurement and AP automation platform for the mid-market. We make it easy for organizations to take control of spend and save money. We’re looking for a talented and team-driven Senior Manager, Sales Development to join us on our journey.




ABOUT THE ROLE

Procurify is looking for a motivating and inspiring person who is passionate about leading growing sales professionals.

 

You are a person with a knack for leadership, developing talent, and building and refining processes and you’re motivated by helping our customers achieve the best version of themselves. You will be joining a team of high performers who excel at building relationships and crushing quotas.

 

Everyone at Procurify is a team player. This role will be responsible for managing performance, creating strategic plays/tactics, hiring and promoting talent, and driving funnel performance all the way to revenue. We’re seeking entrepreneurial people who are willing to challenge the status quo and contribute to larger strategic objectives.



This role will also play a part in how we continue to evolve as an AI-enhanced platform — whether through improving how work gets done, contributing to AI-enabled product experiences, or helping teams and customers operate more effectively using data and automation.




WHAT YOU’LL BE WORKING ON

 - Lead and scale a high-performing BDR organization, driving strategic outbound pipeline generation while overseeing inbound lead management to ensure high-quality qualification and consistent conversion

 - Set the long-term vision and strategic direction for the outbound function, aligning initiatives with broader revenue and go-to-market goals

 - The BDR organization reports into Sales Leadership, and you will align closely with Account Executives and Sales Managers to build, refine, and execute strategic plays for building high-quality, conversion-ready pipeline

 - Partner with Sales, Marketing, RevOps, and Product to develop integrated programs that drive consistent, high-quality lead generation and conversion

 - Establish a data-driven performance culture by developing robust reporting, forecasting, and coaching systems

 - Identify and implement new tools, processes, and workflows to optimize team efficiency and scalability

 - Champion cross-functional collaboration and influence key strategic decisions across GTM teams

 - Act as a leader-coach: mentor emerging managers, support career development, and foster a culture of continuous improvement

 - Represent the voice of the outbound team to senior leadership, surfacing trends, challenges, and opportunities

 - Own and refine the playbook for scaling teams, territories, and talent in a dynamic growth environment

 - Help create a scalable path to promotion for top BDR’s progressing to SMB AE’s
   
   

KPI’s

Core Areas of Focus beyond quota achievement:

 - Conversion Ratios: Meeting-to-opportunity conversion and pipeline revenue value.

 - Speed to Lead: Monitoring and optimizing team SLA response times on incoming prospects.

 - Dial Volume: Driving accountability around consistent daily team activities (calls, emails, connects).

 - Forecast Accuracy: Managing weekly pipeline tracking and leveraging data/AI automation to predict revenue.

 - Team Development: Conducting daily coaching on pitch/objection handling to drive continuous improvement on team goals.
   
   


WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 5+ years of progressive sales or business development experience, including 2+ years leading outbound BDR or SDR teams at scale

 - Proven success leading teams to consistently hit or exceed pipeline and revenue quotas, with a track record of driving year-over-year metric improvements

 - Strategic mindset with a strong operational background — able to translate high-level goals into executable roadmaps

 - Deep understanding of outbound sales motions, metrics, and leading indicator

source_jobs.title: Manager, Accounting
source_jobs.description:
MANAGER, ACCOUNTING




LOCATION: CANADA (REMOTE)



Procurify is the AI-enhanced procurement and AP automation platform for the mid-market. We're looking for a talented and team-driven Manager of Accounting to join us on our journey.




ABOUT THE ROLE



Reporting to the Director of Finance, the Manager of Accounting is the operational core of Procurify's corporate accounting function. You own the month-end close, GL review, internal reporting package, and direct management of the corporate accounting team. This is a hands-on leadership role in a lean team where execution quality and cross-functional credibility matter equally.




WHAT YOU'LL BE WORKING ON



Accounts Receivable Operations

 - Own end-to-end AR operations — with a focus on DSO reduction and cash flow predictability

 - Manage the invoicing cycle for accuracy and timeliness; oversee the collections process with a structured, relationship-preserving approach

 - Drive operational discipline around AR aging, escalation thresholds, and write-off processes; maintain a clean and current AR ledger

 - Identify process gaps that create revenue leakage, delayed cash, or customer friction — and own the solutions

 - Own AR-related internal controls, credit policy compliance, and procedure documentation
   
   

Accounts Payable Operations

 - Own end-to-end AP operations — with a focus on payment accuracy, vendor trust, and working capital discipline

 - Manage the vendor payment cycle for accuracy and timeliness

 - Drive operational discipline around AP aging, payment terms optimization, and exception management; maintain a clean and current AP ledger

 - Identify process gaps that create payment delays, duplicate spend, or vendor friction — and own the solutions

 - Own AP-related internal controls, procurement policy compliance, and procedure documentation
   
   

Procurify Platform — Expert User & Product Partner

We don't just sell Procurify — we run our own AP operations on it. This role is central to that commitment.

 - Run all internal AP workflows end-to-end through Procurify and become the definitive internal expert on how the platform performs in a real finance operation

 - Document gaps, workarounds, and friction points encountered in daily use; translate those into structured, actionable feedback the product team can actually use

 - Participate actively in product discovery sessions — bring the practitioner's perspective to roadmap planning and feature prioritization; your day-to-day experience is a direct input into what gets built

 - Maintain a recurring feedback cadence with the product team — proactive input on workflow design and usability, not just reactive bug reports

 - Test new feature releases and beta initiatives ahead of broader rollout; validate that changes improve the operational experience and flag regressions before they reach customers
   
   

AI Thought Leadership

 - Stay ahead of how AI is transforming AP and AR

 - Proactively evaluate and pilot AI use within the accounting function; build a roadmap for where automation can reduce manual effort without sacrificing control

 - Act as an internal champion for AI adoption — educate the team, document outcomes, and scale what works
   
   

Month-End Close

 - Own the full month-end close — manage the close calendar, task sequencing, and cross-team coordination to hit deadlines every cycle

 - Own the AP and AR close sub-processes end-to-end — cutoff, accruals, reconciliations, and final sign-off

 - Review and approve journal entries, balance sheet reconciliations, and aging schedules; own GL completeness before handoff to the Director of Finance

 - Serve as the primary escalation point for close execution issues

 - Continuously improve close efficiency — reduce days-to-close through better sequencing, tooling, and upstream preparation
   
   

Team Leadership & Development

 - Directly manage the corporate accounting team; set goals, conduct reviews, and invest in profession

source_jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer II
source_jobs.description:
Full Stack Engineer II



ABOUT US

Procurify is the AI-enhanced procurement and AP automation platform for mid-market organizations. We make it easy for organizations to take control of spend and save money.

We’re looking for a pragmatic and thoughtful engineering leader to help scale our platform, development practices, and team.



ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for a Full Stack Engineer II to join our team and help build the core engine and user experiences that power the Procurify platform. You will be a key contributor across both backend and frontend systems—working on everything from complex business logic and APIs to polished, high-performance user interfaces.

In this role, you’ll collaborate closely with designers, product managers, and other engineers to solve challenging technical problems and ship high-quality features end to end. You’ll need to be passionate about building reliable backend systems and intuitive, scalable frontend applications, and eager to grow your skills in a fast-paced, modern cloud environment.

Everyone at Procurify is a team player. A big part of this role involves a desire for personal growth and a customer-centric mindset. We’re seeking entrepreneurial people who are willing to challenge the status quo and contribute to larger strategic objectives.

WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - AI Tool Proficiency: Daily use of tools like GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, or Cursor to stre

source_jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Senior Frontend Software Engineer




ABOUT US




PROCURIFY IS THE AI-ENHANCED PROCUREMENT AND AP AUTOMATION PLATFORM FOR MID-MARKET ORGANIZATIONS. WE MAKE IT EASY FOR ORGANIZATIONS TO TAKE CONTROL OF SPEND AND SAVE MONEY.


WE’RE LOOKING FOR A PRAGMATIC AND THOUGHTFUL ENGINEERING LEADER TO HELP SCALE OUR PLATFORM, DEVELOPMENT PRACTICES, AND TEAM.




ABOUT THE ROLE

Procurify is looking for a motivated, collaborative, and creative person who is passionate about technology.

 

You’re a person with a knack for solving some of the most pressing technology challenges in SaaS application development while leveling up the team of engineers around you, and you’re eager to help our customers achieve the best version of themselves.

 

Everyone at Procurify is a team player. A big part of this role involves a desire for personal growth, and a customer-centric mindset. We’re seeking entrepreneurial people who are willing to challenge the status quo and contribute to larger strategic objectives.




WHAT YOU’LL BE WORKING ON

 - Build & Ship Frontend Features: Design, develop, and maintain responsive, user-friendly frontend components using TypeScript/React.

 - Create High-Quality Frontend Experiences: Implement reusable, accessible, and performant UI components in React.

 - Drive User Experience: Collaborate with product and design to deliver intuitive user experiences.

 - Champion Code Quality: Ensure you and other team members are contributing clean, efficient, testable, and reusable code that is easy to maintain and extend and aligns with our technical strategy and coding standards.

 - Strengthen System Architecture: Provide leadership in the technical output of your team and ensure technical designs follow appropriate design patterns, are architecturally sound, and adhere to secure coding practices.

 - Our Tech Stack:
   
   - Application: Python/Django, Typescript/React
   
   - Cloud: AWS
   
   - Infrastructure & Containers: AWS, Kubernetes, Terraform
   
   - CI/CD: CircleCI
     
     


LEAD WITH CARES:

 - Commitment: Demonstrates accountability and follow-through, delivering reliably and owning outcomes in a way that others can depend on.

 - Ambition: Takes initiative with curiosity and a growth mindset, pursuing bold ideas that elevate impact and performance.

 - Resilience: Shows adaptability, composure, and perseverance through challenges, staying focused and effective in a fast-changing environment.

 - Excellence: Brings rigor, collaboration, and a strong quality focus to deliver high-performing solutions and raise the bar for outcomes.

 - Simplicity: Applies focus, clarity, and streamlining to cut through complexity and enable efficient, impactful execution.
   
   


WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - Frontend Experience: 5+ years of professional experience in hands-on work across frontend systems, preferably in a SaaS environment.

 - React & TypeScript: Experience building modern web applications with React and TypeScript, including component-based architecture and state management.

 - AI Tooling: Lead the evaluation and integration of new AI developer tools to continuously improve team velocity.

 - Agile & Collaborative: Experience working with agile practices (Scrum/Kanban) and CI/CD principles. You thrive in a team environment.

 - Empathetic & Accountable: You act with compassion, believe that your team's success is your success, and communicate effectively with both technical and non-technical colleagues.
   
   


WHAT MAKES PROCURIFY A GREAT PLACE TO WORK FOR ENGINEERS

 - A modern tech stack with opportunities to influence future architecture.

 - A culture committed to learning, experimentation, and engineering excellence.

 - Clear technical vision and empowered teams who own their outcomes.

 - Genuine collaboration, psychological safety, and a people-first culture.

 - Meaningful problems to solve with real customer and business impact.
   
   

WHY PROCURIFY?

We’re committed to helping mission-drive

notes: Procurify is a mid-market procurement and AP automation platform with a mix of tech and non-tech roles.
